title: convolvulus heynei
intro: Convolvulus heynei, also known as the Indian bindweed or hedge bindweed, is a perennial climber native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Convolvulus heynei include its potential to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a remedy for skin conditions and wounds. The plant's herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
